_doc: CAD pipeline persistent config. Auto-detected on first run; edit manually to override.

enhance._backend_doc: Options: 'engineering' (★★★★★ recommended for precision, free, 0.1s/img) | 'gemini' (★★★★ recommended for appearance, ~$0.02/img) | 'fal' (★ EXPERIMENTAL — Flux produces poor results on simplified CAD geometry, reserved for future detailed 3D) | 'comfyui' (local GPU, untested this release). Leave empty for auto-detect.
enhance._consistency_doc: reference_mode: 'v1_anchor' = use V1 enhanced result as style reference for V2+; 'none' = disabled. Run probe_proxy.py --write-config to auto-detect proxy capabilities.

fal._doc: EXPERIMENTAL: fal.ai Flux ControlNet — cloud API, hard geometry lock. Requires FAL_KEY env var. Flux model produces red/green noise + color distortion on simplified CadQuery geometry. Reserved for future use with detailed 3D models.

engineering._doc: No AI — Blender PBR render → light post-processing → JPG. Perfect geometry, zero cost.
